# [clang-fuzzer] Crash in `llvm::APInt::APInt`

**Author:** gal1ium
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/165555
**Status:** Closed
**Labels:** clang:frontend, crash-on-invalid, generated by fuzzer, clang:bytecode
**Closed Date:** 2025-11-06T11:52:13Z

## Body

Hi, while testing clang by the fuzzing driver `clang-fuzzer`, it found a crashing case:

Version: 531fd45e9238d0485e3268aaf14ae15d01c7740f

Flags:
```
mkdir build
cd build
cmake -GNinja -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DLLVM_ENABLE_PROJECTS="lld;clang;compiler-rt" ../llvm -DLLVM_ENABLE_ASSERTIONS=ON -DLLVM_BUILD_RUNTIME=Off -DLLVM_BUILD_INSTRUMENTED_COVERAGE=On -DCLANG_ENABLE_PROTO_FUZZER=ON
ninja clang-fuzzer
```

PoC:
```c
nstexpr ool e(in0){switch(0)0=0:eturn t(
```

Reproduction:
`./bin/clang-fuzzer ./poc`

Crashing thread backtrace:
```
#0  0x00007ffff7a51e10 in __memmove_avx512_unaligned_erms (/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libc.so.6)
                       at ../sysdeps/x86_64/multiarch/memmove-vec-unaligned-erms.S:873

                       at /src/llvm/llvm/include/llvm/ADT/APInt.h:180

#2  0x000055555d390b44 in llvm::APSInt::APSInt (fuzz-binaries/clang-fuzzer)
                       at /src/llvm/llvm/include/llvm/ADT/APSInt.h:24

                       at /src/llvm/clang/lib/AST/ExprConstant.cpp:19018

                       at /src/llvm/clang/include/clang/AST/Stmt.h:1945

                       at /src/llvm/clang/lib/AST/ExprConstant.cpp:19757
```

## Comments

### Comment 1 - tbaederr

This asserts in `EvaluateKnownConstInt`:
```console
clang: /home/tbaeder/code/llvm-project/clang/lib/AST/ExprConstant.cpp:19089: APSInt clang::Expr::EvaluateKnownConstInt(const ASTContext &) const: Assertion `!isValueDependent() && "Expression evaluator can't be called on a dependent expression."' failed.
```

---

### Comment 3 - ecnelises

Canonicalized case:

```cpp
constexpr bool e() {
  switch (false) {
  0==0: return false;
  }
}
```

After adding `case` before `0==0`, the crash disappears. Difference:

```
0==0:
CaseStmt 0x122829620
|-BinaryOperator 0x122829600 '_Bool' '=='
| |-IntegerLiteral 0x1231167c0 'int' 0
| `-IntegerLiteral 0x1231167e0 'int' 0
`-ReturnStmt 0x122829658
  `-CXXBoolLiteralExpr 0x122829648 '_Bool' false

case 0==0:
CaseStmt 0x13b132e58
|-ConstantExpr 0x13b132e38 'int'
| |-value: Int 1
| `-ImplicitCastExpr 0x13b132e20 'int' <IntegralCast>
|   `-BinaryOperator 0x13b132e00 '_Bool' '=='
|     |-IntegerLiteral 0x13b1167c0 'int' 0
|     `-IntegerLiteral 0x13b1167e0 'int' 0
`-ReturnStmt 0x13b132e90
  `-CXXBoolLiteralExpr 0x13b132e80 '_Bool' false
```

---
